creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
I mess up the 'feedback' part. Decided to reply by via email instead. I  
don't approve this, because it is security issue and incomplete. With this  
script, it opens up to the world when users don't have firewall/router. As  
for the incomplete, it's best to create 'transmission' user/group and get  
transmission-daemon to use this.

Cheers,
Mezz


--
